docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SEE, MADELINE AS TO DEFENDANT DUK , PATRICIO E. C/O CLEVELAND ELEMENTARY SCHOOL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
